items.title: MLB Spring Training Buzz: Padres Sign Former Dodgers RHP Walker Buehler
items.description: It's time to dust off those ball bags — MLB spring training has commenced!

items.title: Heisman Winner Fernando Mendoza Says He'd Be 'Blessed And Honored' To Play For Raiders
items.description: Heisman Trophy winner and national champion QB Fernando Mendoza is now starting to really shift his mindset toward the NFL.

items.title: Steve Cohen Says Mets Will ‘Never’ Have a Team Captain as Long as He’s Owner
items.description: New York Mets owner Steve Cohen likes the vibe in a revamped clubhouse, and says he’ll never have a captain in charge of that scene.

items.title: Wrexham Set For Blockbuster FA Cup Tie Against 8-time Champion Chelsea
items.description: Wrexham will host eight-time champion Chelsea for a place in the FA Cup quarterfinals next month.

items.title: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Says He’s ‘Turned the Page’ on Blue Jays’ World Series Heartbreak
items.description: The Toronto Blue Jays are ready to move on from the 2025 World Series.
